productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Casual Black Wallets
description: Crafted from textured synthetic leather, this black wallet from Reid and Taylor is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a textured finish, this bi-fold wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and brown synthetic leather detailing and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 12 cm X 9.5 cmSynthetic leather for flexibility and durabilityTwo compartments with fabric inner lining on the insideMultiple partitions on the bi-fold to stash away cards and coinsCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
